title: vaccinium crenatifolium
intro: Vaccinium crenatifolium, also known as the blue-berried cranberry or mountain cranberry, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant is native to North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vaccinium crenatifolium include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
